LanguageData.PawnBack_Melee: {Backer_nameDef} has successfully returned after a previous kidnapping. The camp where {Backer_pronoun} was being held has been attacked by rabid animals, {Backer_pronoun} took advantage of the chaos and incapacitated several guards animals. Relying on that meat, {Backer_pronoun} eventually made it back to the colony.\n\n{Backer_nameDef} has some food left over, and their return has made the colony happy.
LanguageData.PawnBack_Intellectual:
{Backer_nameDef} has successfully returned after a previous kidnapping. {Backer_pronoun} observed the guards' behavioral patterns and the camp's structure while incarcerated, commiting to memory the schedules and layouts. At the right moment, {Backer_pronoun} snuck out of the camp. {Backer_pronoun} managed to build an improvised radio to contact {Faction}, and finally return with the trading caravan.

{Backer_nameDef} brought something back from the imprisonment as well.
"{Backer_nameDef}"'s return has made the colony happy.
LanguageData.PawnBack_Mining: {Backer_nameDef} has successfully returned after a previous kidnapping. It only took one night for {Backer_pronoun} to dig out of his guarded cell with an improvised pickaxe. The guards could do nothing but look at the large hole in the cell. For {Backer_nameDef}, it was how to get back to the colony that was the problem. After defeating a hostile search party or two, he managed to return.\n\n"{Backer_nameDef}"even dug up something during the escape, which {Backer_pronoun} now has in his possession. {Backer_nameDef}'s return has made the colony happy.
LanguageData.PawnBack_Social: {Backer_nameDef} has successfully returned after a previous kidnapping. The escape was easy, on the first night {Backer_pronoun} charmed one of the guards, forming a friendship. {Backer_pronoun} even managed to even convince the guard to escape with them. At an opportune moment, {Backer_pronoun} managed to leave the camp with the guard. The two of them supported each other all the way back.\n\n{Backer_nameDef} and the guard {Backer2_nameDef} have joined the colony. {Backer_nameDef}'s return has made the colony happy.
LanguageData.PawnSkipToHome: {Backer_nameDef} has successfully returned after a previous kidnapping. {Backer_pronoun} used the skip ability to escape from the prison easily. In a flash of light, they have returned as if nothing happened.\n\n{Backer_nameDef}'s return has made the colony happy.
